title: (Bullish Signal) CCXI, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling CCXI's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 46 similar cases where CCXI's MACD histogram became positive, and 39 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 85%. Current price $66.64 is above $61.95 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 01/04/21 - 02/04/21, the price experienced a +12% Uptrend. During the week of 01/28/21 - 02/04/21, the stock enjoyed a +15% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/wzq3ngozrof61.png?width=1532&format=png&auto=webp&s=62232a64d48b02a41d076f87688448863e9280e7

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on February 02, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on CCXI as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that  in 82 of 96 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for CCXI just turned positive on February 04, 2021. Looking at past instances where CCXI's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 39 of 46 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The 10-day Moving Average for CCXI crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 12, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 14 of 17 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

Following a +7.11% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where CCXI advanced for three days, in 223 of 284 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

CCXI may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9110587-chemocentryx-s-ccxi-65-97-moving-average-convergence-divergence-macd-histogram-just-turned-positive?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=earnings)
